text:
Market today: Mixed vibes. Mag7/momentum names just had their 4th worst stretch in 22 years, but history says 70% of the time they bounce from here. China's June rebound on U.S. exports is a mild tailwind for chips. Still, sentiment is shaky and your book is concentrated in exactly the names that got hit hardest.

Your holdings: Three need attention. AVGO is your biggest position, down 16% and flagged SELL — on margin, that hole gets deeper fast; watch that $336 stop hard. PLTR is down 13%, also SELL — no fundamental news today but momentum washout is its enemy. SPAL is down nearly 17% with a 2x leveraged structure that decays daily — this one bleeds even sideways; it's close to your $19 stop and deserves a hard look right now. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited data — treat it like it can move 20% either way any day.

Watch: 1) Whether Mag7 bounce signal holds — your whole book rides on it. 2) Any chip-sector reaction to Apple's China memory pivot story.

Bottom line: Your margin exposure is concentrated in the exact names that just got crushed — protect the downside before chasing any bounce.
